summary: The following standard extends [ERC-4626](./eip-4626.md) by adding support for asynchronous deposit and redemption flows. The async flows are called Requests. New methods are added to asynchronously Request a deposit or redemption, and view the status of the Request. The existing `deposit`, `mint`, `withdraw`, and `redeem` ERC-4626 methods are used for executing Claimable Requests. Implementations can choose whether to add asynchronous flows for deposits, redemptions, or both.
title: Asynchronous ERC-4626 Tokenized Vaults
